_comment: operon-plugin hooks. Phase 5 carryover #3: the SessionStart bind_handle hook was REMOVED because per Anthropic's hooks reference, SessionStart fires BEFORE the MCP servers connect, so `type: mcp_tool` hooks on SessionStart are not callable -- Claude Code logs 'mcp_tool hooks are not available for the SessionStart hook event (no MCP client context)' and the hook no-ops. Identity binding is fully covered by env-anchored resolution: every MCP tool call resolves OPERON_AGENT_HANDLE -> _handles/<handle>.json on entry (see identity.py + spawn_agent._require_coordinator etc.). The `bind_handle` MCP tool is retained in the codebase (hidden from tools/list per SPEC §7.1) for future use if a post-MCP-connect lifecycle event becomes available, or for hand-driven validation, but is no longer wired to any hook event. This file now declares no hooks; future phases will add PreToolUse / Stop hooks here.
